ns0:entry.ns0:title: JetBrains/compose-multiplatform
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JetBrains/compose-multiplatform
Language: kotlin
Compose Multiplatform, a modern UI framework for Kotlin that makes building performant and beautiful user interfaces easy and enjoyable.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JetBrains/koog
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JetBrains/koog
Language: kotlin
Koog is a JVM (Java and Kotlin) framework for building predictable, fault-tolerant and enterprise-ready AI agents across all platforms – from backend services to Android and iOS, JVM, and even in-browser environments. Koog is based on our AI products expertise and provides proven solutions for complex LLM and AI problems

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JetBrains/kotlin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JetBrains/kotlin
Language: kotlin
The Kotlin Programming Language.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JingMatrix/TEESimulator
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JingMatrix/TEESimulator
Language: kotlin
Software simulation for Android hardware-backed key pairs with key attestation

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NexaAI/nexa-sdk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NexaAI/nexa-sdk
Language: kotlin
Run frontier LLMs and VLMs with day-0 model support across GPU, NPU, and CPU, with comprehensive runtime coverage for PC (Python/C++), mobile (Android & iOS), and Linux/IoT (Arm64 & x86 Docker). Supporting OpenAI GPT-OSS, IBM Granite-4, Qwen-3-VL, Gemma-3n, Ministral-3, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: android/nav3-recipes
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/android/nav3-recipes
Language: kotlin
Implement common use cases with Jetpack Navigation 3
